title: ruehssia hilariana var. macieliana
intro: Ruehssia hilariana var. macieliana, also known as Mexican rue or ruehssia, is a plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Ruehssia hilariana var. macieliana include relief from menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Ruehssia hilariana var. macieliana is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
